headline: the people behind the work.
intro: every bmkrs project is staffed from a vetted bench of senior builders, designers, writers and specialists. now the bench is open: hire from it, or earn a place on it.
barHeadline: one question decides it: would we put you on our own client work?

barSteps.title: referred or apply
barSteps.body: most of the bench came recommended by people already on it. the rest applied and stood out.

barSteps.title: vetted on shipped work
barSteps.body: we review work that went live, not portfolios polished for interviews.

barSteps.title: proven on ours first
barSteps.body: new members work on bmkrs projects before we ever put them in yours.

forCompanies.heading: hire from the bench.
forCompanies.body: bring senior people in to build alongside your team. brand, voice, pr, product, with no recruitment and no ramp-up. the same people who deliver our client work, working as part of yours.
steps: we match from people we have already worked with
they start in days, inside your team

forSpecialists.heading: earn a place on it.
forSpecialists.body: we work with people we would stake our name on. if that is you, the work is good and the company is better.
steps: we vet like we are hiring for ourselves
we only call when something genuinely fits

connects: already a client? the network is what powers motion embedded, our most hands-on tier. it is the same bench, whether we run the work or you do.

seo.metaDescription: the vetted bench of senior builders, designers and specialists behind every bmkrs project. hire from it, or earn a place on it.
